overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student character in wizard robes exploring a circular medieval dormitory room with four-poster beds, stone walls, and wooden architectural elements. The character walks around the warm-lit interior, examines the vaulted ceiling with heavy wooden beams, and approaches a large wooden door.

events.description: Level up notification UI element appears briefly on screen indicating character progression

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the dormitory, observing the surroundings and passing by four-poster beds and furniture

entered.detail: dark wood bed with red curtains and bedding
medieval stone masonry wall with arched windows
tall dark wood cabinet with carved details
black cast iron heating stove with vertical pipe
red wall banner with gold lion crest
upholstered red armchair near the wardrobe
large wooden storage chest at foot of bed
ornate circular woven rug on wooden floor
wooden writing desk with books and lamp
tall standing lamp with white shade
circular clock mounted on stone wall
wrought iron bird cage on stand

segments.scene_description: The character explores a warm, artificially lit circular dormitory room with stone walls and wooden floors. Various four-poster beds with dark wood frames and red curtains are positioned around the room, along with wardrobes, armchairs, and a central cast iron stove. A brief UI notification appears indicating a level up.

scene_state.functional_zone: vaulted ceiling with exposed wooden beams

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the ceiling architecture and wooden beams

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the ceiling, examining the wooden architectural details and rafters

entered.detail: heavy timber support beams crossing the vaulted ceiling
radiating wooden roof rafters forming conical pattern
lit lantern suspended from ceiling beam
vertical black pipe extending from stove to ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the impressive vaulted ceiling constructed with heavy wooden beams and rafters forming a conical pattern. The cast iron stove pipe extends vertically through the frame, and red banners hang down from the upper walls. The floor-level furniture is no longer visible as the view focuses on the architectural ceiling details.

scene_state.functional_zone: dormitory exit area with large wooden door

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large wooden door at the far end of the dormitory

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal studs and arched stone frame
carved stone arch surrounding the exit door
tall standing mirror with dark wooden frame
tall stack of books beside the mirror
low wooden storage cabinet with drawers

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to level and the character walks toward a large wooden door set within a carved stone archway at the far end of the dormitory. The character passes by a full-length mirror and stacks of books on the right, with the cast iron stove now visible to the left rear as the character approaches the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a warm, circular medieval dormitory that shifts from a detailed exploration of the living space to an architectural study of the ceiling before heading toward the exit. It begins with the character navigating the stone-walled room past four-poster beds with red curtains, wardrobes, and a central cast iron stove. As the character pauses, the camera tilts upward to reveal a vaulted ceiling of heavy wooden beams and rafters forming a conical pattern, with red banners hanging from the upper walls and a stove pipe extending vertically. The view then returns to eye level as the character walks away from the stove, passing a full-length mirror and stacks of books. Finally, the camera follows the character toward a large wooden door set within a carved stone archway at the far end of the room.
